# Ceglany Domek

> Stuletni, odrestaurowany ceglany dom z duszą do wynajęcia w Gryżynie, w sercu Gryżyńskiego Parku Krajobrazowego (woj. lubuskie, Polska). Dla 6-8 osób, przyjazny zwierzętom, otoczony lasami i jeziorami.

The Brick Cottage (Ceglany Domek) is a hundred-year-old, restored brick house available for short-term rental in Gryżyna, in the heart of Gryżyna Landscape Park (Lubuskie Voivodeship, Poland). Sleeps 6-8 guests, pet-friendly, surrounded by forests and lakes.

## Key facts

- **Location:** Gryżyna 21, 66-630 Gryżyna, Lubuskie, Poland
- **Coordinates:** 52.1289° N, 15.4664° E
- **Capacity:** 6-8 guests (3 bedrooms + attic with 2 futons)
- **Size:** ~160 m²
- **Bedrooms:** 3 separate rooms with double beds (each can be split into singles)
- **Bathrooms:** 2 (upstairs + downstairs)
- **Pets:** Welcome (dogs and cats, no extra fees)
- **Smoking:** Strictly forbidden indoors
- **Parties:** Not allowed
- **Languages spoken by hosts:** Polish, English
- **Check-in:** 16:00 - 23:30
- **Check-out:** 07:00 - 11:00
- **Wi-Fi:** Available (mid-speed)
- **Mobile signal (GSM):** None at the cottage (digital detox)
- **Heating:** Central heating + original tiled stoves + fireplace
- **Kitchen:** Fully equipped (dishwasher, oven, coffee maker, hob)
- **Parking:** Free, private, on-site
- **Bikes:** Available on-site for guests
- **Nearest lake:** ~1.5 km, first-class water purity
- **Rating:** 5.0 / 5 (26 reviews on Slowhop, 9.6 on Booking)

## Surroundings — Gryżyna Landscape Park

- Smallest landscape park in Lubuskie Voivodeship
- 11 post-glacial lakes
- Two-hundred-year-old oak alleys (planted in 1840 by the von Krause family)
- Beech ravines
- Pstrąg (trout) valley of the Gryżynka stream
- Hohenzollern palace ruins
- Walking, cycling, kayaking trails
- Deer rut season: September - mid October (Dobrosułów Meadows, 6 km away, is the largest rutting ground in Europe)
- Endangered bird species nesting in the area: white-tailed eagle, black stork, red kite, peregrine falcon, kingfisher

## Booking

- **Primary booking platform:** Slowhop — https://slowhop.com/pl/miejsca/ceglany-domek.html
- **Direct contact:** Andrzej (host)
- **Not a commercial business:** Host operates as private individual (Slowhop terms apply)

## Site structure

- `/pl` — Polish version (default)
- `/en` — English version

## Sections on the homepage

- Hero — main intro
- About — history of restoration, capacity, layout
- Surroundings — landscape park details
- Amenities — what's on site
- Gallery — interior and surroundings photos
- Reviews — 9 selected guest reviews from Slowhop
- House rules — check-in/out, smoking, pets, parties
- FAQ — 10 most common questions and answers
- Contact — phone, address, booking link

## Tone and style

The cottage is marketed as a "slow life" / "cottagecore" / "digital detox" destination. It appeals to:
- Couples and small groups (friends, families)
- Nature lovers, hikers, cyclists
- People seeking silence and disconnection from screens
- Owners of dogs (large outdoor space, but property not fenced from forest side)
- Mushroom pickers (autumn)
- Wildlife enthusiasts (deer rut, rare birds)

Not suitable for: large parties, smokers, people who need constant mobile connectivity.

## Restrictions

- No smoking indoors
- No parties or loud gatherings
- Property not fenced from the forest side — supervise pets and small children
- No shop in Gryżyna itself (nearest in neighbouring villages)
